summary: Hydrated state shows #59210 is the only open cluster member and remains the canonical WhatsApp docs PR. It is not merge-ready because the hydrated ClawSweeper and Greptile comments identify update/i18n work, and this dedupe-only job blocks merge, fix, and raise_pr actions. No close/comment/label mutation is planned; closed #61884 and #61902 stay historical context only.

actions.reason: #59210 is the best live canonical path for the remote/headless WhatsApp QR documentation gap, but this run should only classify it and keep it open because it still needs a narrow docs update before any future merge path.
Closed context ref only; keep as historical related evidence and do not mutate.
